name: Pedro Flores
abstract: Pedro Flores born (March 9, 1894 – July 14, 1979) was one of Puerto Rico's best known composers of ballads and boleros.

works_created.t: Bajo un palmar (Under a Palm Tree)

about_quotes.speaker: Frank "Machito" Grillo
about_quotes.evidence: like Rafael Hernandez and Pedro Flores, Marcelino Guerra could be included.
